name: Lake Victoria Mining Company, Inc.
summary: Lake Victoria Mining Company, Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of gold properties in Tanzania. It holds interests in 3 prospective gold projects with 1 mining license, 2 prospecting licenses, and 43 primary mining licenses covering 32.71 square kilometers located in Tanzania. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
